title: Hostile Volume – A game about adjusting volume with intentionally bad UI
full_text:
Please complete a short customer service satisfaction survey to access the volume controls.
 

 1. Before we begin: Is a hotdog a sandwich?
 
 Absolutely yes, it fits the structural definition.
 Absolutely not, that is culinary blasphemy.
 It is technically a taco.
 I am trapped in a volume slider, please send help.
 
 
 

 2. Overall, are you satisfied with this once in a lifetime gaming experience?
 
 Honestly, yes! It's brilliantly creative and fun.
 Absolutely not. I hate this with a burning passion.
 It's a love-hate relationship, mostly hate.
 I will be sending my therapy bills to the developer.
 
 
 

 3. How would you rate the visual design, UI and physical appearance of the dev?
 
 10/10 - Sleek, modern, and visually fantastic.
 1/10 - It's clunky, ugly, and hard to read.
 It looks great while it's actively torturing me.
 I can't see the UI through my tears of frustration.
 
 
 

 4. What are your thoughts on the background music?
 
 It's unironically a great, relaxing track.
 It's mind-numbingly repetitive and awful.
 I muted my device 15 levels ago.
 It perfectly scores my descent into madness.
 
 
 

 5. How do you feel about the level design/mechanics?
 
 They are clever puzzles that are satisfying to beat.
 They are completely unintuitive, poorly designed and the dev needs a new hobby.
 Whoever made this is a certified supervillain.
 I am just clicking blindly and hoping for 25%.
 
 
 Submit to Proceed
